title: Google Tracking

fields.label: UTM Ad Group
fields.name: utm_ad_group
fields.instructions: Ad Group name (e.g. sub set of the campaign).

fields.label: UTM Term
fields.name: utm_term
fields.instructions: Paid search keyword or targeting term.

fields.label: UTM Content
fields.name: utm_content
fields.instructions: Ad variation or content identifier for A/B testing.

fields.label: Search Term
fields.name: search_term
fields.instructions: The actual search query typed by the user. Captured from the search_term URL parameter, populated via Google Ads ValueTrack {keyword} in the final URL suffix.

fields.label: Device Type
fields.name: device_type
fields.instructions: Customer's device (Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop). Auto-captured from form submission.

fields.label: Referral Page
fields.name: referral_page
fields.instructions: The page the customer was on before submitting the form. Auto-captured from form submission.

fields.label: Landing Page
fields.name: landing_page
fields.instructions: The first page the customer landed on when they arrived at the site. Auto-captured from form submission.

fields.label: Google Click ID
fields.name: gclib
fields.instructions: Google Ads click identifier (gclid). Auto-captured from form submission.

fields.label: GA4 ClientID
fields.name: ga4_client_id
fields.instructions: The unique Google Analytics identifier used to track the user's full journey and multi-session behavior.

description: Tracks Google Ads click IDs and UTM parameters captured from website form submissions.
